observation:
Action: look around
You are in the street. To the South you see the driveway. To the West you see a closed sliding door.

Action: look around
You are in the corridor. To the North you see the driveway. Through an open patio door, to the South you see the backyard. To the East you see a closed wood door. To the West you see a closed wood door.

Action: look around
You open the sliding door, revealing the supermarket.
